title: • The Warriors – Ignore one minor debuff per class session.
content:
• The Warriors – Ignore one minor debuff per class session.
• The Fallen Angels – Can sacrifice XP to steal XP from another player.

✔ Party Bonuses:
• Players who form parties gain unique combined buffs depending on their mix of archetypes.
• Example: If a party consists of a Warrior, an Archivist, and a Trickster, they get a “Balanced Team” buff, giving them flexible rerolls in different situations.

✔ Archetype Family Bonuses:
• Every archetype belongs to a “family” of similar characters (e.g., warriors, scholars, tricksters, etc.).
• If multiple members of the same family are in a faction, their buffs increase slightly.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Encourages players to form alliances.
✔ Adds deeper faction strategy and unique synergies.
✔ Ensures balance between different playstyles.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 458 (chunk 458/555)
